defaults.timezone.label: Assistant Timezone
defaults.timezone.help: Optional timezone label included in briefing payloads.

defaults.lookaheadDays.label: Default Calendar Window
defaults.lookaheadDays.help: Default number of days to scan when the model does not provide an explicit end time.

defaults.maxCalendarResults.label: Max Calendar Results
defaults.maxCalendarResults.help: Default maximum number of events returned per provider.

defaults.maxMailResults.label: Max Mail Results
defaults.maxMailResults.help: Default maximum number of email results returned per provider.

google.accessToken.label: Google Access Token
google.accessToken.help: Legacy direct access token fallback for Google Calendar and Gmail. Prefer google.authProfileId from `openclaw executive-assistant auth google`. You can also use ${OPENCLAW_EXECUTIVE_ASSISTANT_GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN}.

google.authProfileId.label: Google Auth Profile
google.authProfileId.help: Preferred Google OAuth profile id created by `openclaw executive-assistant auth google`.

google.writableCalendarIds.label: Writable Google Calendar IDs
google.writableCalendarIds.help: Explicit allowlist for calendar writes. Leave empty to keep Google calendar writes disabled.

microsoft.accessToken.label: Microsoft Graph Access Token
microsoft.accessToken.help: Legacy direct access token fallback for Microsoft Graph calendar and mail. Prefer microsoft.authProfileId from `openclaw executive-assistant auth microsoft`. You can also use ${OPENCLAW_EXECUTIVE_ASSISTANT_MICROSOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}.

microsoft.authProfileId.label: Microsoft Auth Profile
microsoft.authProfileId.help: Preferred Microsoft OAuth profile id created by `openclaw executive-assistant auth microsoft`.

microsoft.userId.label: Graph User ID
microsoft.userId.help: Use "me" for delegated tokens or a specific user id for app-routed Graph access.

microsoft.writableCalendarIds.label: Writable Microsoft Calendar IDs
microsoft.writableCalendarIds.help: Explicit allowlist for calendar writes. Leave empty to keep Microsoft calendar writes disabled.
